title: Sable: New Sodium Compat
description: Adds compatibility between Sable and the new version of Sodium.
body:
## If you have this mod installed, Sable and Sodium will not be officially supported.

## Description

While Sable's latest commit includes a patch to support the new Sodium, it hasn't been released yet.

Therefore, this mod backports the new Sodium support to Sable 1.2.2 and adds compatibility with the new Sodium.

Currently, Create: Aeronautics also works.

Note: Compatibility issues may occur with other mods that depend on Sable.
